content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 contains "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", an explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple explicitly bans offering rewards in exchange for reviews or ratings under 2.3.9, since it manipulates App Store ratings integrity. The paywall copy directly ties a free Premium week to leaving a 5-star review, which is a textbook violation. Remove this line entirely or replace it with a neutral, non-incentivized prompt (e.g. using SKStoreReviewController without any reward tied to it).
